title: JIPMER Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 03 Project Technical Support III Posts
description: The Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancy of 03 Project Technical Support III posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.Sc Nursing and Post-graduation can apply for the JIPMER Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned ...
